menu_items.name: Beef with Broccoli
menu_items.description: Tender sliced beef with fresh broccoli in a rich oyster sauce.

menu_items.name: Mongolian Beef
menu_items.description: Thinly sliced flank steak with scallions in a sweet soy sauce.

menu_items.description: Sliced beef stir-fried with a variety of fresh vegetables in brown sauce.

menu_items.name: Orange Beef
menu_items.description: Crispy beef in a sweet and tangy orange sauce.

menu_items.name: Beef in Black Bean Sauce
menu_items.description: Tender beef sautéed with green peppers and onions in savory black bean sauce.

menu_items.name: Beef with Snow Peas
menu_items.description: Sliced beef stir-fried with crisp snow peas in a light garlic sauce.

menu_items.name: Pepper Steak
menu_items.description: Juicy beef strips with green and red peppers in a savory brown sauce.

menu_items.name: Spicy Szechuan Beef
menu_items.description: Shredded beef with celery and carrots in a fiery Szechuan sauce.

menu_items.name: Moo Shu Beef
